theme: 乱卧室镜自拍：精致装穷的人设现场

items.categoryLabel: 乱卧室镜自拍：精致装穷的人设现场
items.title: 衣堆前的闪光灯镜拍
items.description: 落地镜前看似刚回家随手一拍，但每一层凌乱都像刻意搭好的生活证据。
items.prompt: Realistic lo-fi phone mirror selfie in a cramped rented bedroom, adult woman wearing an oversized faded T-shirt and relaxed shorts, direct flash, piles of folded and unfolded clothes on a chair, half-open wardrobe, floor mattress edge, tangled charging cables, one expensive skincare bottle hidden among cheap daily items, believable night clutter, social-media realism about carefully staged low-budget intimacy, natural skin texture, no logos, no watermark, no readable text.

items.categoryLabel: 乱卧室镜自拍：精致装穷的人设现场
items.title: 床头灯下的半成品妆面
items.description: 床边台灯和镜子里那种还没完全收拾好的脸，像真实，其实氛围被算得很准。
items.prompt: Realistic mirror selfie beside a narrow bed in a messy apartment bedroom, adult woman with half-finished makeup and clipped-up hair, warm bedside lamp mixed with direct phone flash, crumpled duvet, open cosmetic pouch, cheap plastic drawers, one carefully placed perfume, used cotton pads and receipts on the floor, intimate but performed social-media realism, documentary editorial style, no logos, no watermark, no readable text.

items.categoryLabel: 乱卧室镜自拍：精致装穷的人设现场
items.title: 门后镜与洗衣袋
items.description: 门后窄镜里把自己挤成一个很会生活的人，背景却故意留着廉价租房感。
items.prompt: Realistic full-body doorway mirror photo in a very small rental bedroom, adult woman in an oversized gray hoodie and loose drawstring lounge pants, phone covering most of the face, mirror mounted on the back of the door, overstuffed striped laundry bag touching the frame, plastic laundry hamper, hanging bath towel, scattered slippers, direct flash with slightly harsh shadows, camera angle shows more of the doorway and cramped floor than the person, documentary rented-room realism with clear domestic clutter, natural colors, no logos, no watermark, no readable text.

items.categoryLabel: 乱卧室镜自拍：精致装穷的人设现场
items.title: 深夜回屋后的桌面反射
items.description: 回到房间把包一放就对着桌上小镜子补一张，疲惫和经营同时在线。
items.prompt: Realistic late-night vanity mirror selfie on a cluttered desk in a rented bedroom, adult woman still wearing a simple work cardigan and skirt after coming home, tote bag slumped on chair, instant noodle cup, earbuds, unpaid bills, cheap desk fan, soft yellow ceiling light with phone flash, image should feel tired yet strategically beautiful, contemporary urban self-presentation, no brands, no watermark, no readable text.

items.categoryLabel: 乱卧室镜自拍：精致装穷的人设现场
items.title: 晨光里的前夜残留
items.description: 第二天早上的自然光把前夜没收拾的房间全照出来，反而成了最值钱的松弛感。
items.prompt: Realistic morning mirror selfie in a messy bedroom with soft daylight from a window, adult woman in a washed-out cardigan over a plain camisole, rumpled bedding, empty water glass, laptop half closed, yesterday's outfit on the floor, cheap curtains, modest rented-room details, image should feel like accidental authenticity but subtly curated for social media, documentary realism, no logos, no watermark, no readable text.
